app.name: Pixdap
app.tagline: Create stunning AI images in seconds
app.description: Transform your ideas into beautiful images with the power of AI. Free to start.

landing.hero_subtitle: Type a prompt, pick a style, and watch AI create your image in seconds.
landing.feature1_desc: Ghibli, Anime, Realistic, Pixel Art, Cyberpunk and more
landing.feature2_desc: Generate images in 5-15 seconds with cutting-edge AI
landing.feature3_desc: Get 5 free credits on signup. Watch ads for more.

generate.title: Generate Image
generate.prompt_placeholder: Describe the image you want to create...
generate.prompt_tips: Tip: Be specific! Include details like colors, mood, setting.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.referral_desc: Share this code with friends. You both get 3 bonus credits!

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to start creating AI images
auth.terms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.no_credits: You don't have enough credits. Watch an ad or upgrade to premium.
errors.generation_failed: Failed to generate image. Please try a different prompt.

ad.loading_subtitle: While AI works its magic, here's a quick message
